title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: local LLM runner with a built-in model library and OpenAI-compatible API server.
highlights: REST API compatible with OpenAI chat completions

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for the Ollama API; chat, embed, pull models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client published on npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders.
highlights: drop-in replacement for OpenAI in chains

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (like ChatGPT) that connects to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (Rust) for browsing and chatting with Ollama models in the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline coding assistance.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU nodes.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters on Maven Central.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library and CLI for Ollama; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on that runs Ollama locally for private voice assistants.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented Generation stack using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams answers from your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes or generate text using Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for the Ollama REST API with async HTTP support.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama chat as an async web endpoint.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision an Ollama server on AWS EC2 with GPU.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server letting any MCP client (e.g. Claude Desktop) query Ollama.
